name: Gifted Institute for Information Technology, Daegu National University of Education
description: Studied the fundamentals of development through LEGO Mindstorms, **C, Python, App Inventor**, and related coursework.
highlights: Advanced to and completed the intensive program after finishing the **foundational course**.

name: Daegu Software Meister High School
description: Studied software engineering topics including **C, Java, data structures, and computer systems**, while participating in **production service development projects**.
highlights: Selected by both the school and the regional education office as a **nominee for the Talent Award of Korea**.
Selected for the **Korean delegation to ISEF 2022** and named a **Finalist in the Embedded Systems category**.
Presented iOS development and project experience at school development sessions, including the **B1CODE Conference**.
Served as the leader of the school service development team **Progress**, planning, developing, and deploying the [**Toongether project**](./projects/team/toongether.md).
